SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification

Class NotificationTask

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification.NotificationTask
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbandonNotification, ExceptionFailureNotification, ExitKeYNotification, GeneralFailureNotification, GeneralInformationNotification, ProofClosedNotification
public abstract class NotificationTask extends Object
A notification task maps a NotificationEvent to a list of actions to be performed when the event is encountered.

    Method
    Description

    addNotificationAction(NotificationAction action)
    adds an notificatin action this task.

    returns if this task should be executed in auto mode
    void
    execute(NotificationEvent event, NotificationManager manager)
    called to execute the notification task, but this method only takes care that we are in the even dispatcher thread

    called to execute the notification task

    • NotificationTask

      public NotificationTask()

  • Method Details

    • getNotificationActions

      public List<NotificationAction> getNotificationActions()
      Returns:
      returns the notification actions belonging to this task

    • addNotificationAction

      public void addNotificationAction(NotificationAction action)
      adds an notificatin action this task.
      Parameters:
      action - the NotificationAction to be added

    • execute

      public void execute(NotificationEvent event, NotificationManager manager)
      called to execute the notification task, but this method only takes care that we are in the even dispatcher thread
      Parameters:
      event - the NotificationEvent triggering this task
      manager - the NotificationManager to which this tasks belongs to

    • executeActions

      protected void executeActions(NotificationEvent event, NotificationManager manager)
      called to execute the notification task
      Parameters:
      event - the NotificationEvent triggering this task
      manager - the NotificationManager to which this tasks belongs to

    • getEventID

      public abstract NotificationEventID getEventID()
      Returns:
      the event if of this task

    • automodeEnabledTask

      protected boolean automodeEnabledTask()
      returns if this task should be executed in auto mode
      Returns:
      if true execute task even if in automode
